ham.subject: Your SaaS Subscription Renewal Notice – Action Required
ham.body:
Hi Arjun,

Hope you’re doing well! This is a quick reminder that your subscription to

   • OmniDrive Cloud Storage (Plan: Pro Plus)
   • TeamCollab Project Management (Plan: Business)

is set to renew on 25th April 2026. The total amount of ₹12,320 will be debited from the card you have on file.

If you’d like to make any changes to your plan, add users, or update payment information, please log in to your dashboard at <URL> and navigate to the Billing section.

If you do not wish to renew, simply cancel your subscription in the same area; your access will remain active until the end of the current billing cycle.

Thanks for being a valued customer. Should you have any questions or need support, feel free to reply to this email or contact our help center.

Best regards,

Support Team
OmniDrive & TeamCollab

spam.subject: Urgent: IT Helpdesk Ticket - Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Pratik,

We have detected a critical security issue with your corporate email account (pratik.singh@techworld.in). As per the IT Security Policy, this account has been flagged for potential phishing activity and must be investigated immediately.

Please follow the steps below to verify your identity and secure your account:

1. Click on the link below to access the IT Helpdesk portal and create a ticket.
   <URL>

2. Enter the following details:
   • Username: pratik.singh@techworld.in
   • Employee ID: 170348
   • Department: R&D

3. Attach a scanned copy of your PAN card and a recent utility bill (address proof). The documents must be in PDF format and not larger than 2 MB.

4. Submit the ticket by 11:59 PM today.

Failure to comply will result in a temporary suspension of your mailbox and possible revocation of access to all corporate resources. This is a mandatory compliance step to protect our network.

If you believe this is a mistake or you have already completed these steps, please reply to this email with "Ticket ID: 0000" and we will investigate further.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Regards,

IT Security Team
TechWorld Solutions
